text: Which item is worn on your head?

explanation.A: ❌ ربطة العنق (tie) تلبس حول الرقبة، وليس على الرأس.
explanation.C: ✅ صحيح: الشماغ (shomagh) هو غطاء رأس تقليدي في بعض البلدان العربية.

text: Which clothing item is formal wear for men?

explanation.B: ✅ صحيح: البدلة (suit) هي لباس رسمي للرجال.

text: What do you wear on your feet?
Steve is going to Rio de Janeiro for work. (Answer yes or no – choose True/False)

explanation.A: ❌ غير صحيح. من النص: Steve is going to Rio de Janeiro for vacation, not work.
explanation.B: ✅ صحيح: ستيف ذاهب إلى ريو لقضاء عطلة، وليس للعمل.

text: He’s going to need casual clothes. (True/False)

explanation.A: ✅ صحيح: بما أنها عطلة، فهو يحتاج ملابس غير رسمية (casual).
explanation.B: ❌ غير صحيح: لأنه في عطلة، لا يحتاج ملابس رسمية.

text: Nawal is going to get married next weekend. (True/False)

explanation.A: ✅ صحيح: حسب النص، نوال ستتزوج نهاية الأسبوع القادم.

text: Sabah is going to buy an abaya. (True/False)

explanation.A: ❌ غير صحيح: النص لا يذكر أن صباح ستشتري عباءة.

text: Which item is traditional clothing worn in some Arab countries?

explanation.B: ✅ صحيح: الثوب (thobe) هو لباس تقليدي في بعض الدول العربية.

text: Which item is typically worn by women?

explanation.A: ❌ ربطة العنق (tie) يرتديها الرجال والنساء لكنها ليست نموذجية للنساء.
explanation.C: ✅ صحيح: الفستان (dress) هو لباس نموذجي للنساء.

text: Which item is used to keep you warm?

explanation.B: ✅ صحيح: المعطف (coat) مصمم للحفاظ على الدفء.

text: Choose the correct answer for: 'I ________ going to eat.'

explanation.A: ✅ صحيح: مع I نستخدم 'am' في تركيب going to.

text: Fill in the blank: 'She ________ going to sleep.'
Choose the correct sentence:

explanation.A: ✅ صحيح: They + are + going to + play.

text: I ____ going to finish my homework.
Which sentence is incorrect?
options: He is going to travel tomorrow.
We are going to have a test.
She going to buy a dress.
I am going to call you later.

explanation.C: ❌ خطأ: ناقص 'is' (She is going to buy).

text: Choose the correct question form:
options: Are you going to come with us?
You are going to come with us?
Do you going to come with us?
Are you go to come with us?

explanation.A: ✅ صحيح: Are + فاعل + going to + فعل.
explanation.B: ❌ ترتيب خاطئ، هذا خبر وليس سؤالاً.

text: What does 'heavy coat' mean?
What does 'scarf' help you with?
In the passage, what does 'put on' mean?
Where is Andy going to go?
What is Andy going to wear?

explanation.C: ✅ صحيح: ملابس دافئة لأن النرويج باردة.

text: Why is Andy going to take sunglasses?
What do you think Iguassu Falls are?
Where do you think Iguassu Falls are located?
Why do people visit waterfalls?
Where are the Iguassu Falls?
How do visitors go to the falls?
What do visitors wear at the falls?

explanation.A: ✅ صحيح: سترات وأحذية (لأن الطقس بارد ورطب).

text: Which sentence talks about the future?
options: I am meeting my friend tomorrow.

explanation.C: ✅ صحيح: المستقبل (باستخدام مضارع مستمر + زمن مستقبلي).

text: Which form is correct for future plans?
options: I go to the party tomorrow.
I am going to the party tomorrow.
I going to the party tomorrow.
I goes to the party tomorrow.

explanation.A: ❌ المضارع البسيط لا يستخدم للمستقبل عادة.

text: Which word shows future time?
Correct the mistake: 'He meeting his brother tonight.' Choose the correct version:
options: He is meeting his brother tonight.

explanation.B: ✅ صحيح: He is meeting his brother tonight.

text: Correct the mistake: 'She is meet her friend tomorrow.' Choose the correct version:
options: She is meet her friend tomorrow.
She is met her friend tomorrow.
She is meeting her friend tomorrow.

text: Correct the mistake: 'I am go to the party tomorrow.' Choose the correct version:
options: I am go to the party tomorrow.
I am going to the party tomorrow.
I go to the party tomorrow.
I am went to the party tomorrow.
